findings.line: The dwarves answered with movement, not talk.
findings.reason: Pattern 1 direct contrast pivot; the sentence keeps its meaning once the negated half is removed.

findings.deletionTest: The villagers were cheering the story they'd been given.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 preamble negation; the paragraph already supplies the real fact after the negated setup.

clusterFlags: Jaina march analysis section (multiple mild kills in an analytical POV lane)
Capital-approach paragraph (2+ inanimate-subject agency smears in close succession)

findings.subject: Dragonblight
findings.realAgent: the wind, distance, and dead terrain wearing the formation down
findings.reason: The geography is carrying the causal burden instead of the concrete conditions doing the work.

findings.line: The thought hit hard enough to make her stumble.
findings.subject: thought
findings.realAgent: Jaina's realization about Kel'Thuzad landing on her hard enough to break her stride
findings.reason: Pattern 9 nominalizes a mental act and makes it strike her from outside.

findings.line: The thought came hard enough to stop her in the middle of the file.
findings.subject: thought
findings.realAgent: Jaina locking onto the three-school answer hard enough to halt the formation
findings.reason: Pattern 9 again packages Jaina's mental action as an external agent.
findings.suggestedFix: She stopped in the middle of the file.

findings.line: At night the sea stopped being a road and became black motion under blacker sky. Jaina sat on a coil of rope with her back to the mast and forced the answer into plainer words until it could live outside her own head.
findings.subject: answer
findings.realAgent: Jaina translating the framework into words she could actually say aloud
findings.reason: Pattern 5 gives the answer its own life instead of naming Jaina's effort to make it speakable.
findings.suggestedFix: At night the sea stopped being a road and became black motion under blacker sky. Jaina sat on a coil of rope with her back to the mast and forced the answer into plainer words until she could say it aloud.

findings.line: The road south widened, then narrowed again as the capital pulled traffic inward.
findings.subject: capital
findings.realAgent: the converging roads and thickening traffic near the city
findings.reason: The city is given the organizing pull that belongs to the road layout and traffic pattern.
findings.suggestedFix: The road south widened, then narrowed again as traffic thickened toward the capital.

findings.line: Every mile showed the same offense in a different dress.
findings.subject: mile
findings.realAgent: the repeated wreaths, crests, bells, and village behavior along the road
findings.reason: The distance marker is doing the observational work that belongs to the repeated visible evidence.
findings.suggestedFix: The same offense kept recurring in different dress.

findings.line: The word settled across the little court harder than any oath.
findings.subject: word
findings.realAgent: the people in the court absorbing Sylvanas's answer and feeling its force
findings.reason: The second P5/P6 sweep caught an abstract utterance carrying the physical-impact verb instead of the listeners taking the blow.

audits.cleanReason: Counted one emotional 'tightened' use, one literal route-mark use of 'mark,' and one plot-functional eye-trigger beat; no tic exceeded its chapter cap, and the look/eye beats stayed logistical or plot-bearing rather than generic gaze choreography.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A still has 9 mild KILLs across negation addiction and intent smear, which exceeds the threshold of 3 mild-only findings.
